cards.title: Doomsayer

cards.card_text: En Garde Leader Action: If you control fewer characters than an opponent • Your performer issues a challenge to target opposing non-Leader controlled by that opponent, using your choice of [com], [fin], or [inf].
cards.flavour: "For you, Vissenta, I draw The Duel. Your Fate is defined in your fight against your father and Cesca. Let your Honor guide you to Triumph." - Elisabetta Bonora
cards.name: Honorable

cards.card_text: Maneuver: Until your next round, your target Mercenary at this location takes all wounds your participant would suffer instead.
cards.flavour: "Loyalty is a painful virtue." - Daniella Dietrich
cards.name: Answering the Call

cards.card_text: Maneuver: Copy the effects of a Technique on the adversary or one of their equipped attachments.
cards.flavour: "Each school of the blade has its own strengths and weaknesses, best to learn as many as you can." - Bastien Girard
cards.name: I Know that Trick!

cards.card_text:
City Action: Your performer issues a [Com] challenge to target opposing character with equal or lower [Inf].

Gambling Maneuver: If your participant has more [Inf] than the adversary • +1[Riposte] and draw a card.
cards.flavour: "For you, Servo, I draw The Tower. Beware the steep price of arrogance." - Elisabetta Bonora
cards.name: Arrogant

cards.card_text:
Add a Renown to [Bazaar]. Then, move a Renown to [Bazaar].

Forced: When a player's adversary is destroyed during a duel at [Bazaar] • That player collects a Renown from [Bazaar]. (This Forced ability activates for any player.)
cards.flavour: "Traditionally, men and women prayed for love on the night of Saint Terni’s Feast. Tonight, they prayed for mercy." - Carmella Vanessa Salvaggi
cards.name: Gutter Full of Roses

cards.card_text: Reaction: When an opponent's ability would wound, move, or engage your character • Your performer at that location suffers those effects instead. (If they are able)
cards.flavour: "For you, Horatio, I draw the The Hanged Man. I wouldn't call you Altruistic, but you certainly give too much, spread among too many, and suffer the consequences. You have earned so much rope, my charming fellow. Be careful not to hang yourself." - Elisabetta Bonora
cards.name: Altruistic

cards.card_text:
Add or move a Renown to [Forums].

Leader City Action: Pressure your Leader's location with [Com]. You succeed even if tied. If successful, look at the top four cards of the City Deck. Discard any number of them and replace the rest in any order.
cards.flavour: "He made the charge, so now he's in charge." - Solomonia Saboruvya
cards.name: Kaspar's Occupation

cards.card_text: Maneuver: If the adversary is a Sorcerer or Monster • +2 [Parry] or +2 [Thrust].
cards.flavour: "I'll need no cards for you, Fräulein Rosine. The guidance of The Glyph is wasted on those who call me superstitious." - Elisabetta Bonora
cards.name: Superstitious

cards.card_text:
Add a Renown to two different locations.



Reaction: After your character at a City location is destroyed • Wound each opposing character at that location. Each of your characters at that location heals a wound. If the destroyed character was a Zealot, draw a card.
cards.flavour: "Blessed is Theus, to whom I give my soul. Blessed is my flock, to whom I give my flesh and blood." - The Book of Common Prayer
cards.name: Noble Sacrifice

cards.card_text: Maneuver: Participant was wounded this duel . Wound the Adversary, if they are destroyed claim the Location.
cards.flavour: "Love or war, Lorenzo is ruled by too much passion." - "Padre" Aníbal
cards.name: It's Personal

cards.card_text: Maneuver: If you have greater or equal [Com] than the adversary • Destroy target attachment on them.
cards.flavour: "First your weapon, then your bones, then your spirit. I'll break them all." - Yevgeni
cards.name: Sunder

cards.card_text:
Negotiable

Reaction: After Julius is recruited or moves to a City location • Name a Trait and target an opposing character. Then, reveal two cards at random from the hand of that character's controller. If any of the revealed cards has the named Trait, wound that character.
cards.flavour: "I survived the Crimson Roger. The Don and his Streghe can't scare me."
cards.name: Julius Caligari
cards.title: Scion, Survivor

cards.card_text: Technique: Destroy this card • +1 Thrust.
cards.flavour: “Clean, quick, quiet.” - Horatio Lockwood
cards.name: Throwing Knife

cards.card_text:
Offhand. This card cannot be moved.

Reaction: When the equipped participant's adversary announces a
Technique
• Cancel its effects.

Technique: If the equipped character has a Melee Weapon • +1 [Riposte].
cards.flavour: "He holds the forum with a literal iron fist." - Yevgeni
cards.name: Kaspar's Panzerhand

cards.card_text:
Reaction: After your round of the duel begins • Unequip this card and play it as your combat card. Gain Lethal.

Technique: +2 [Thrust].
cards.flavour: "It's the last remnant of his past, he carries the weight of one like he does the other." - Elina's Private Journal
cards.name: Grandfather's Hammer

cards.card_text:
Add a Renown to [docks] and [forums]



City Action: Engage your performer • They issue a [Fin] challenge to target opposing character. If your performer is a Duelist, it can only be refused by discarding a card.
cards.flavour: "If nothing else, they probably won't expect a ground assault at sea." - Makepeace Botwighte
cards.name: When Least Expected

cards.card_text:
Equipped character gains Sorcerer.

City Action: Engage this card • Look at the top three cards of your deck. Sink any and replace the rest in any order. Then, you may discard a card to draw a card.
cards.flavour: "It produces miracles on command. But the command changes every time. Infuriating little wonder." - Kaj Kousei
cards.name: Syrneth Puzzle Box
cards.title: Ponderous Prism

cards.card_text:
While your performer is a Scoundrel or Diplomat, this card has -1 cost.

City Action: Move your performer to an adjacent City location with more Renown.

Maneuver: +1[parry] or +1[thrust]
cards.flavour: "Good deals and fair deals are mutually exclusive. You'll find no one's accused me of being a fair merchant." - Térence Rois
cards.name: Tip the Scales

cards.card_text:
Action: En garde your equipped performer.

Maneuver: +1 [Riposte]. If your participant is equipped with a Weapon, draw a card.
cards.flavour:
"You look ridiculous."
"And you look helpless." - Claude de la Roche and Rena Klingenhalter
cards.name: Well Equipped
